What We Do

Our Services

End-to-end automotive and engineering solutions for private individuals, corporate fleets, and institutions across Lagos.

Get a Free Quote →
01
Automobile Repair

Complete engine diagnostics, mechanical and electrical repairs, transmission servicing, brake systems, suspension work, and scheduled maintenance for all vehicle makes and models.

Engine diagnostics & overhaul
Electrical & electronics systems
Transmission & gearbox repair
Brake & suspension servicing
Air conditioning systems
Get a quote →
02
General Contracting

Full-scale engineering contracting services for automotive workshops, service bays, institutional facilities, and commercial infrastructure — from concept to completion.

Workshop design & construction
Service bay installation
Commercial facility upgrades
Equipment procurement & setup
Project supervision & delivery
Get a quote →
03
Auto Parts Supply

Sourcing and supply of genuine OEM and quality-assured aftermarket parts for individuals, independent workshops, dealerships, and fleet operators across Nigeria.

Genuine OEM parts sourcing
Quality aftermarket alternatives
Engine & drivetrain components
Body & electrical parts
Bulk supply for workshops
Get a quote →
04
Fleet Support & Management

Comprehensive fleet maintenance contracts, servicing schedules, and operational support for corporate fleets, logistics operators, and government vehicle pools.

Preventive maintenance scheduling
Emergency breakdown response
Fleet condition reporting
Parts inventory management
Driver advisory & training
Get a quote →
05
Technical Consulting

Expert engineering advisory for businesses, fleet owners, and institutions — covering procurement strategy, technical compliance, workshop setup, and automotive investment decisions.

Procurement & cost optimisation
Workshop setup advisory
Second opinion diagnostics
Technical documentation
Compliance & standards review
Get a quote →

Pricing
Why Choose Us

The standard Lagos
businesses deserve.

We built Mor-Omotsht Auto Works on a simple principle: do the job right, charge a fair price, and treat every client with honesty. That principle has shaped every service we offer.

01
Certified Engineering Expertise

Every engagement is led by a qualified engineer. We don't outsource or cut corners — your vehicle or project is handled by someone who knows exactly what they're doing.

02
Transparent, Itemised Quoting

We provide a detailed written quote before any work begins. The price you approve is the price you pay — no add-ons, no surprises on the final invoice.

03
End-to-End Service Delivery

From the initial assessment through parts sourcing, repair, and final handover — we manage the full process. One point of contact, full accountability.

04
Built for the Lagos Context

We understand local road conditions, fuel quality, parts availability in Nigeria, and the real operational pressures on Lagos drivers and fleet operators.

05
Registered Nigerian Business

We are a fully registered Nigerian enterprise, capable of providing formal documentation, VAT receipts, and compliance paperwork for corporate and government engagements.

How It Works

Our Process

Simple, transparent, and client-first — from your first message to job completion.

1
Reach Out
Contact Us

Call, WhatsApp, or fill in our quote form. Describe your vehicle, issue, or project. We respond within 24 hours — usually much faster on WhatsApp.

2
Assessment
Diagnosis & Review

We assess the vehicle or project scope — either on-site or at our workshop. Our engineer personally reviews the situation before any quote is prepared.

3
Clear Quote
Itemised Estimate

You receive a detailed, itemised quote covering all labour and parts. No work begins until you've reviewed and approved the quote — no exceptions.

4
Delivery
Execution & Handover

We complete the work to the agreed scope, on time, and walk you through exactly what was done. Full documentation provided for corporate clients.

5+
Services Delivered
24h
Response Time
🇳🇬
Proudly Registered in Nigeria
About the Company

Engineering precision.
Honest service.

Mor-Omotsht Auto Works Motor Division is a Lagos-based automobile specialist and general contracting firm, registered in Nigeria and headquartered in Ebute-Metta. Founded by Engr. Moruf O. Shittu, we were built on one conviction: that Lagosians deserve automotive and engineering services they can actually trust.

Over the years we've grown from a focused repair operation to a full-service automotive and contracting firm — serving private car owners, corporate fleets, logistics companies, and government agencies across Lagos and beyond. Every service we offer carries the same commitment: qualified execution, clear pricing, and honest communication throughout.

Qualified Engineer at Every Job

Engr. Moruf O. Shittu personally oversees all work — you're never dealing with an unqualified technician making unsupervised decisions on your vehicle.

No Hidden Costs, Ever

We quote before we work. Every naira is accounted for in writing before we touch your vehicle or project. The final invoice matches the approved quote.

Local Knowledge, Global Standards

We understand Lagos road conditions, local fuel quality, and parts availability in Nigeria — and we apply international engineering standards to every job.

Leadership

Meet the Managing Director

Engr. Moruf O. Shittu
Managing Director
Engr. Moruf O. Shittu
Managing Director — Mor-Omotsht Auto Works Motor Division

Engr. Moruf O. Shittu is the founder and Managing Director of Mor-Omotsht Auto Works Motor Division. A qualified engineer with extensive hands-on experience across automotive systems, mechanical engineering, electrical diagnostics, and general contracting, he established this company with a clear mission: to bring engineering-grade quality and genuine transparency to automotive services in Lagos.

Operating from Ebute-Metta, Lagos, Engr. Shittu personally supervises all work taken on by the firm — whether a private car repair, a fleet maintenance contract, or a full contracting engagement. His involvement at every stage is not a marketing claim; it is the operational model the business is built on.

Under his leadership, the company has grown to serve private individuals, corporate clients, and institutional operators across Lagos, maintaining a reputation built entirely on referrals and repeat business.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Straight answers to the questions we hear most often. If yours isn't here, just ask.

Have a specific question?

Send us a WhatsApp message and our engineer will respond personally, usually within a few hours.

Ask on WhatsApp

We work on all major car makes and models — saloons, SUVs, crossovers, minibuses, commercial vehicles, and light trucks. Japanese, European, American, and Korean vehicles. If you have an unusual model, message us first and we'll confirm before you bring it in.

We commit to responding to all quote requests within 24 hours. WhatsApp is typically faster — in most cases you'll hear back within a few hours during working days. For emergencies, call directly on 08037065254.

Yes, for certain repairs and fleet clients we can dispatch to your location within Lagos. On-site servicing is also available for fleet contracts. Contact us to discuss whether your job is suitable for mobile service — some repairs require workshop facilities.

We assess the vehicle or project scope, then produce an itemised written quote covering all labour and parts. You review and approve it before we do anything. The approved quote is the final price — we don't add items without your explicit sign-off.

Yes. We have established supplier relationships for both genuine OEM parts and quality aftermarket alternatives. We can source for older or less common models. Share your vehicle's make, model, year, and the specific part — we'll confirm availability and pricing.

Yes. We are a registered Nigerian business with experience supporting corporate fleet programmes and institutional contracts. We provide full documentation including formal quotations, invoices, VAT receipts, and technical reports. Contact us to discuss a fleet support or contracting engagement.

We are based in Ebute-Metta, Lagos. Reach us via WhatsApp at +234 803 706 5254 or +234 802 594 1061 to get directions. For urgent matters, call directly. WhatsApp messages are responded to throughout the week.

Yes. All repair work carried out by our team is backed by a workmanship warranty. Parts supplied carry manufacturer warranty where applicable. Specific warranty terms are confirmed in writing at the point of quoting for each job.
